steps.title: Identify the structures
steps.content: Two independent clauses are joined at the blank: the quotation ending "...idealistic direction" and in 1909, for instance, judges recognized Selma Ottilia Lovisa Lagerlöf.... Both are complete clauses.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
The semicolon in direction"; correctly joins the two independent clauses after the closing quotation mark.

  • The comma-only version creates a comma splice.
  • The version with no punctuation between the clauses creates a run-on.
  • The version that adds and breaks the structure.


That matches A.
